<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaaltier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-ìng]][[de:Metall-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de métal]][[hak:Kâng-yìm]][[ja:庚寅]][[ko:경인]][[nds:Metall-Tiger]][[vi:Canh Dần]][[za:Gengyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-în]][[zh-yue:庚寅]][[zh:庚寅]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaaltier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-ìng]][[de:Metall-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de métal]][[hak:Kâng-yìm]][[ja:庚寅]][[ko:경인]][[nds:Metall-Tiger]][[vi:Canh Dần]][[za:Gengyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-în]][[zh-yue:庚寅]][[zh:庚寅]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaaltier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-ìng]][[de:Metall-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de métal]][[hak:Kâng-yìm]][[ja:庚寅]][[ko:경인]][[nds:Metall-Tiger]][[vi:Canh Dần]][[za:Gengyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-în]][[zh-yue:庚寅]][[zh:庚寅]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Tiger|kanji=庚寅|romaji=kanoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=gēngyín|w=keng-yin|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ȵin²¹|y=geng1 jan4|j=geng1 jan4|ci=kɪŋ jɐn|mc=kæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|en|Wood (wuxing)|WD=Q2783877|lt=1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood}} and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|en|Fire (wuxing)|WD=Q5451309|lt=ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire}}, and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood).
[[ja:庚寅]]
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

<!--
==
* Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gang1 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: かのえとら (kanoe-tora)
***Onyomi: こうかのとら (kōka-no-tora)
***Onyomi: こういん (kōin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyeongin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

-->
==Years of Yang Metal Tiger==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 30 when divided by 60 is a year of Kōgo.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Kōgo'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 34|en|AD 34|WD=Q30238|lt=34 AD|1=AD 34}}
* {{ill|AD 94|en|AD 94|WD=Q33620|lt=94 AD|1=AD 94}}
* {{ill|154|en|154|WD=Q30385|lt=154 AD|1=154}}
* {{ill|214|en|214|WD=Q32938|lt=214 AD|1=214}}
* {{ill|274|en|274|WD=Q33512|lt=274 AD|1=274}}
* {{ill|334|en|334|WD=Q32105|lt=334 AD|1=334}}
* {{ill|394|en|394|WD=Q48126|lt=394 AD|1=394}}
* {{ill|454|en|454|WD=Q30794|lt=454 AD|1=454}}
* {{ill|514|en|514|WD=Q32881|lt=514 AD|1=514}}
* {{ill|574|en|574|WD=Q32597|lt=574 AD|1=574}}
* {{ill|634|en|634|WD=Q31056|lt=634 AD|1=634}}
* {{ill|694|en|694|WD=Q23483|lt=694 AD|1=694}}
* {{ill|754|en|754|WD=Q23646|lt=754 AD|1=754}}
* {{ill|814|en|814|WD=Q23447|lt=814 AD|1=814}}
* {{ill|874|en|874|WD=Q23843|lt=874 AD|1=874}}
* {{ill|934|en|934|WD=Q23803|lt=934 AD|1=934}}
* {{ill|994|en|994|WD=Q24114|lt=994 AD|1=994}}
|
* {{ill|1054|en|1054|WD=Q19369|lt=1054 AD|1=1054}}
* {{ill|1114|en|1114|WD=Q19533|lt=1114 AD|1=1114}}
* {{ill|1174|en|1174|WD=Q19690|lt=1174 AD|1=1174}}
* {{ill|1234|en|1234|WD=Q5424|lt=1234 AD|1=1234}}
* {{ill|1294|en|1294|WD=Q5559|lt=1294 AD|1=1294}}
* {{ill|1354|en|1354|WD=Q6118|lt=1354 AD|1=1354}}
* {{ill|1414|en|1414|WD=Q6179|lt=1414 AD|1=1414}}
* {{ill|1474|en|1474|WD=Q6600|lt=1474 AD|1=1474}}
* {{ill|1534|en|1534|WD=Q6447|lt=1534 AD|1=1534}}
* {{ill|1594|en|1594|WD=Q6777|lt=1594 AD|1=1594}}
* {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654 AD|1=1654}}
* {{ill|1714|en|1714|WD=Q6878|lt=1714 AD|1=1714}}
* {{ill|1774|en|1774|WD=Q7697|lt=1774 AD|1=1774}}
* {{ill|1834|en|1834|WD=Q7591|lt=1834 AD|1=1834}}
* {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894 AD|1=1894}}
* {{ill|1954|en|1954|WD=Q18581|lt=1954 AD|1=1954}}
|
* {{ill|2014|en|2014|WD=Q1999|lt=2014 AD|1=2014}}
* {{ill|2074 AD|ja|2074年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2074|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2074 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2070年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2134 AD|ja|2134年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2134|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2134 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2194 AD|ja|2194年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2194|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2194 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2254 AD|ja|2254年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2254|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2254 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2314 AD|ja|2314年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2314|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2314 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2374 AD|ja|2374年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2374|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2374 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2434 AD|ja|2434年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2434|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2434 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2494 AD|ja|2494年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2494|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2494 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2554 AD|ja|2554年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2554|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2554 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2614 AD|ja|2614年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2614|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2614 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2674 AD|ja|2674年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2674|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2674 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2734 AD|ja|2734年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2734|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2734 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2794 AD|ja|2794年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2794|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2794 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2854 AD|ja|2854年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2854|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2854 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2914 AD|ja|2914年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2914|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2914 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2974 AD|ja|2974年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2974|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2974 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

=== Events ===
* In the 4th Year of {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}} (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January|1=January}} becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Tiger==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Keng-chá]]
[[zh-yue:庚寅]]

{{citation needed|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|version=98658269|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Káng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Metall-Tigeri]]
[[de:Yang Metal Tiger]]
[[ja:甲午]]

[[ja:庚寅]]

[[de:Metall-Tiger]]
[[zh:庚寅]]
[[ko:경인]]
[[fr:Tigre de métal]]

[[af:Metaaltier (astrologie)]]
[[de:Metall-Tigreen]]
[[en:Metal Tiger]]
[[fr:Tigre de métalboishak]]
[[it:Kang-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Canh Dần]]
[[za:Gengceij]]
[[ar:Yang Metal Tiger]]

<!--Yang Metal Tiger--><!--Yang Metal Tiger-->
{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Metal Tiger|qq=ja|庚寅|version=103609405|comment=Imported full ja history}}

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Gĕng-ìng]]
[[hak:Kâng-yìm]]
[[nds:Metall-Tiger]]
[[za:Gengyinz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Keng-în]]
[[zh-yue:庚寅]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Gĕng-ìng]]
[[hak:Kâng-yìm]]
[[nds:Metall-Tiger]]
[[za:Gengyinz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Keng-în]]
[[zh-yue:庚寅]]
{{wikidata link|Q1063199}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
